rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for interface-level assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model when writing AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE contracts are placed in valid AADL scopes matching their dependency level.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or types not present in the input AADL model.
Preserve AADL architecture structure during AGREE annex insertion.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type contracts should reference component ports directly, not subcomponent ports unless represented through variables.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
Do not assume numeric or Boolean encodings for AADL event ports.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
